text_block_list.text: One day, during lunch...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I really thought I'd finally get one today...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's just terrible, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There are these squid cornets that I've always
loved, but they got really popular all of a
sudden...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They were featured on TV, and now everyone is
all over them. The past few days have been an
all-out struggle.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Seeing how popular they are now, I'll probably never be able to eat them again.
Stop right there, cynical girl!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Say au revoir to such negative thinking! When you
give up, that's when the race is over!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up on what you love just 'cause of
some stupid trends... You gotta snap back at that
kinda mentality!

text_block_list.name: Pearl & Windy
text_block_list.text:
We are Worldwide Windy! We're the whirlwind
that bites the world!
choice_data_list: How can a whirlwind bite the wo—

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hush, you! Don't think, feel!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Before our burning passion, the laws of the
universe are nothing but ash in the wind!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Worldwide Windy doesn't care about your
stupid, boring logic!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-if you say so... I guess...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Now, cynical girl, time for your training!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
This world won't let you buy squid cornets? Then
bite it back!

I don't quite understand what they're saying, but
it sounds like they're trying to help her buy squid
cornets... If that's the case...
choice_data_list: We need to come up with a strategy first.
Great! No time to waste—let's get to training!
Great! No time to waste—let's get to training!

text_block_list.text:
I don't quite understand what they're saying, but
it sounds like they're trying to help her buy squid
leg cornets... If that's the case...
choice_data_list: We need to come up with a strategy first.
Great! No time to waste—let's get to training!
Great! No time to waste—let's get to training!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's right! What a ravishingly intellectual
answer!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
What's important is a calm mind... Confusion will
cause you to lose even winning battles!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: R-right...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Ya know, I just wanna chomp down whenever I
see some tasty prey.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
But no! I have to watch and wait till the right
moment to bite.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
It can be real chaos when I start biting—especially
when Digital is sneaking around...
choice_data_list:
You're right. It's important to observe your
surroundings.

You're right. It's important to observe your
surroundings.

text_block_list.text:
That's true in races as well. It can be a disaster if
runners lose their rhythm or try to pass and get
blocked.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
That's why in the beginning of a battle, you need
to observe the field with a broad perspective
from the rear.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Just as you would look beyond the seas!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: O-okay... I... think I got it... Or not...

Worldwide Windy continues to lecture Nice
Nature for a while.
A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No way... It actually worked.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Heh! ♪ Looks like we saved another lost sheep at
the edge of the world.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I still have a lot of questions, but... I guess they were pretty helpful.

Nice Nature looks happy with her favorite squid
cornet in hand.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I mean, how're you gonna get to a
thousand bites if you don't start with one?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Into a brand new world we go! We'll show you the
way!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wha... What?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Up! And down! And up! And keep up
the tempo! One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Is this really necessary? I... just want to buy some
bread.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
That's weakness talking! You're as soft as that
super gullible Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Speed! Power! Stamina! You need 'em all to sink
your teeth into your rivals!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I-I didn't say anything about bitin—
choice_data_list: That's right! Take a big bite, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You too?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... Lunch break is almost over now. If I can't
buy one after all this, I'm not gonna be happy.
A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Frustrated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! They're all gone!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No way... It actually worked. I got one.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Those were some fairly respectable
chomps!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uhhh, I didn't bite anyone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I still have a lot of questions, but... I guess they were pretty helpful.

Nice Nature looks happy with her favorite squid
cornet in hand.
